candidates_checked.dry_run_method: hermes send --list telegram plus send_message explicit-target probe
hermes send --list telegram plus send_message explicit-target probe

manual_remediation.reload_required: restart/reload Hermes gateway or start a new Hermes session after updating channel directory so send_message target list includes AL-Hermoine-OPS
manual_remediation.rerun: rerun Run 53 live delivery test and send exactly one safe test to telegram:AL-Hermoine-OPS
manual_remediation.value_required: a Telegram channel/destination record for the actual OPS channel using the existing channel_directory platforms.telegram schema; do not use Marius DM; keep chat/destination IDs secret
manual_remediation.where_to_add_alias: /root/.hermes/channel_directory.json for active default profile, or expose it through the active Telegram gateway connector channel directory
